title: PURCHASING MANAGER (5 DAYS/WEEK - LOCATION: WOODLANDS)
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Managing supplier relationships, negotiating contracts, and ensuring compliance with legal requirements.
  • Streamline Purchasing processes, develop integrated Purchasing strategies to effectively manage the suppliers on order fulfillment, assurance of supply.
  • Lead, develop & implement policies, procedures and metrics to effectively manage the Materials shortages and implement solutions.
  • Sourcing of materials/engineering parts locally/overseas with according to Bill Of Material (B.O.M) and equipment, goods and services.
  • Perform data analysis to recommend trend-based improvements (e.g. demand aggregation) and to aid in decision-making
  • Develop dashboards with procurement trends, forecasts and KPIs for management reporting and recommend early intervention where necessary
  • Manage the team to achieve Key KPI on OTD, Inventory turns, excess & obsolescence, aging Inventory, day of supply in RAW, WIP & FG.
  • Interface with both internal & external stakeholder to derive achievable targets, set up strategic plan and drive the team towards meeting the target as set forth.
  • Other related duties if required.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor in Business administration/Inventory management/Supply chain is preferred
  • Min. 5 years of relevant work experience in Purchasing related Functions (manufacturing industry).
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills
  • Excellent analytical & problem solving & organizational skills
  • Good team player
  • Proficient in MS office & competent in excel.
  • MS Navision ERP system or SAP hand on experience.
  • Familiar with ISO 9001, 14001 and 13485 Quality Management System.
  • Required language(s): English, Mandarin. We are seeking candidates proficient in both English and Mandarin to effectively communicate with our stakeholders.
  • Need to Travel to Batam.
  • 5 days/week and Full-Time positions.

postedCompany.description:
Established in 1981, Yeakin Plastic Industry (YPI) is a leading manufacturer of precision plastic components.
Our core capabilities include precision mould making, injection moulding, insert moulding and component sub-assembly.
YPI Group has grown into an industry leader, delivering fully integrated manufacturing solutions across diverse sectors such as medical, automotive, high-end consumer electronics and other advanced industries.
Headquartered in Singapore, the Group operates three production bases—in Singapore, Suzhou (China) and Batam (Indonesia). Today, YPI employs nearly 2,000 people across three countries, with a combined gross floor area of 57,000 m².
We are proud to be certified to international standards, including ISO/TS 16949, ISO 9001, ISO 13485 and ISO 14001, demonstrating our commitment to quality, innovation and sustainability.
postedCompany.name: YEAKIN PLASTIC INDUSTRY PTE LTD
